data.title: Larger Fonts, Bigger Impact: iQIYI Makes Entertainment More Accessible
data.description: iQIYI introduces 'Extra Large Font' feature to enhance accessibility for senior and visually impaired users.

data.title: Bill Gates Once Called Cryptos, NFTs A Sham: Here's How Much A $1000 Investment In Bitcoin Then Would Be Worth Today
data.description: Microsoft Corp. co-founder Bill Gates has maintained a grim view on cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), and some of his remarks over the years have been unsparing, to say the least.

data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Mixed; Crude Gains Amid China Policy Shift - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets mixed, Nasdaq and S&P 500 hit record highs on strong forecasts and jobs data, Dow down due to health insurance stocks. Asian markets mostly up.

data.title: Chinese Social Media Company Hello Group Gains After Q3 Print, CEO Flags Overseas Growth
data.description: Hello Group Inc reported a 12.1% decline in Q3 net revenue to $381.14M, beating analyst estimate. Momo app's paying users and MAU decreased.
